subcategory: Cinematic animated landing with GSAP scroll effects
use_cases: SaaS product landing page hero to create immediate visual impact
Brand introduction section with cinematic film grain overlay effects
Portfolio or creative tool landing with scroll-triggered animations
Marketing campaign pages requiring dramatic visual storytelling
ai_summary: A cinematic hero component featuring GSAP-powered scroll animations, film grain overlay effects, and 3D gradient text with skeuomorphic materials. The component uses ScrollTrigger for entrance animations and includes theme-aware text shadows that shift between light and dark modes. Designed to create a dramatic first impression with atmospheric visual depth and professional-grade polish.
